name: Exile Target Tuesday
text:
Exile target Tuesday. It does not come back. None of them do.
If it is currently not Tuesday, Exile Target Tuesday resolves anyway out of spite.
Scry your soul, then draw a conclusion. (You may not like it.)
The days that remain reshuffle themselves. The week is now six days long and everyone agrees not to talk about it.
flavorText: Monday looked for its friend and found only a Thursday-shaped hole.
